{"file_path":"/tmp/tron-cost-preview-issue.md","content":"Split out from #649. The cost preview block (issue #636 / PR #648) extends to Solana / BTC / LTC against the existing fee fields on each unsigned-tx envelope (`estimatedFeeLamports`, `decoded.feeBtc`, `decoded.feeLtc`). TRON is intentionally not part of that follow-up because its fee model needs a new on-chain math layer that doesn't share with the others.

{"file_path":"/tmp/pr-body.md","content":"Closes #649

## Summary

Extends the prepare-time cost preview block (issue #636 / PR #648) from EVM to **Solana, Bitcoin, and Litecoin**. Each `prepare_*` (and `preview_solana_send`) result now leads with an `Estimated network fee: ~$X (≈ Y SYM)` line so a fee-shock spike aborts the flow before the user scrolls through the verification + agent-task surfaces.

Per the [decision on #649](https://github.com/szhygulin/vaultpilot-mcp/issues/649#issu...
